code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if i == 0
          cur = v
        else if v > cur
          cur = v
        end
        if i == 0
          result = "#{cur}"
        else
          result = "#{result} #{cur}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
